# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Automation Test

on:
  pull_request_target:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout PR code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: |
        npm ci

    - name: Run Tests
      run: |
        npm test

    - name: Post Results
      uses: actions/github-script@v4
      with:
        script: |
          const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;
          const octokit = github.getOctokit(github.token);
          const test_results = 'Tests completed!';
          octokit.rest.issues.createComment({
            issue_number: issue_number,
            owner: context.repo.owner,
            repo: context.repo.repo,
            body: test_results,
          });
